topics.name: Node
topics.description: Basic unit containing data and a pointer to the next node

topics.name: Head Pointer
topics.description: Pointer to the first node in the linked list

topics.name: Traversal
topics.description: Process of visiting each node in the list sequentially

topics.name: Insertion
topics.description: Adding a new node at the beginning, end, or middle of the list

topics.name: Deletion
topics.description: Removing a node while maintaining list integrity

topics.name: Doubly Linked List
topics.description: Each node has pointers to both next and previous nodes

topics.name: Circular Linked List
topics.description: Last node points back to the first node
